title: Pre-fetch Flickr CDN URLs into Media Thumbnail column
description: Write a one-time data prep script that batch-fetches noembed.com for all Flickr URLs in the Media column, with a ~1 second delay between requests to avoid rate limiting. Write the returned media_url (direct Flickr CDN .jpg URL) into the Media Thumbnail column in the xlsx. Save progress as it goes so it can be resumed if interrupted. When complete, regenerate timeline-data.js. This eliminates all noembed network requests from the live app — drawer images load instantly from the CDN URL. At ~1 req/sec: 516 events ≈ 9 min, 3000 events ≈ 50 min.

title: Auto-sync Google Sheets via GitHub Actions
description: Set up a scheduled GitHub Action that fetches the Google Sheets CSV, runs make_data_js.py (adapted to read from CSV URL), commits and pushes updated timeline-data.js automatically. Configurable schedule (e.g. hourly) plus manual trigger. Eliminates need for team members to manually reparse after editing the shared spreadsheet.

title: Mobile-friendly layout and touch controls
description: Make the timeline usable on mobile devices. Recommended approach: (1) touch pan/zoom — replace mouse drag+scroll with one-finger pan and pinch-to-zoom; (2) collapsible sidebar — hide behind hamburger button on narrow screens, slide in as overlay. Stretch goal: responsive CSS layout stacking sidebar above canvas in portrait mode. Full mobile redesign (vertical list view) is a longer-term option.
